[Table:  Study Or articpation In Eu Education Training Or Research Programmes]
Please  Note: 
- There is a service charge of 24.5€ (Inclusive of 20% VAT)  levied per application over and above the visa fees
- Mobile Biometric Service
- Please reach contact center (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/lux/contact-us)
to get more details about mobile biometric service.
- Visa fee, VFS service fee and Courier fee will be charged in Euro and cash, and other services will be charged in Turkish Lira and Cash. A receipt will be issued for all payments made at the centre.
Note:All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may only be  paid in cash, please note change will be given in Turkish Lira.
visa_types.processing_time:

visa_types.forms:

Visa Application Form (Turkish)
Visa Application Form (English) 
Visa Application Form (French)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Luxembourg for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people wishing to visit Luxembourg
                                                                                        with purpose of attending short period study course, participation in EU education, training or Research programmes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that
                                                                                        he/she falls under this category.
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Luxembourg for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people wishing to visit Luxembourg
                                                                                        with purpose of attending short period study course, participation in EU education, training or Research programmes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that
                                                                                        he/she falls under this category.
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Study Or articpation In Eu Education Training Or Research Programmes]
Please  Note: 
- There is a service charge of 24.5€ (Inclusive of 20% VAT)  levied per application over and above the visa fees
- Mobile Biometric Service
- Please reach contact center (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/lux/contact-us)
to get more details about mobile biometric service.
- Visa fee, VFS service fee and Courier fee will be charged in Euro and cash, and other services will be charged in Turkish Lira and Cash. A receipt will be issued for all payments made at the centre.
Note:All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may only be  paid in cash, please note change will be given in Turkish Lira.

## Documents Required
Study or Participation in EU Education, Training or Research Programmes Visa 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer 
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
- Checklist for an EU family member

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply  with the following specifications: 
- Must be an up-to-date photograph
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- One passport-size photograph according to ICAO standards and not older than 3 months
- Full face taken straight forward 50 - 50 mm from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be shut
- Applicants should clearly write their name and surname on the back of their photographs

                                                                                        Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos. 

## Processing Time
Since our work is primarily administrative in nature, we have no say on whether you will be granted a visa and how long it will take to process, as this is entirely the
                                                                                        prerogative of the Embassy of Luxembourg in Turkey. 

## Download Forms
The application form for Luxembourg can be downloaded from the below link.
Visa Application Form (Turkish)
Visa Application Form (English) 
Visa Application Form (French) 

## To Download a Form:

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer 
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

Visa Application Form FR
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is intended to allow foreign nationals to obtain a long term visa (type D) allowing them to stay in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg for
                                                                                                over 90 days. This visa applies This visa applies for family members of Luxembourg, EU, EEA or Switzerland nationals who are wishing to obtain permit for long-term
                                                                                                residence in Luxembourg. 
Family member means:
- The spouse;
- Their children under 18 years old;
- Children of the spouse under 18 years old.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is intended to allow foreign nationals to obtain a long term visa (type D) allowing them to stay in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg for
                                                                                                over 90 days. This visa applies This visa applies for family members of Luxembourg, EU, EEA or Switzerland nationals who are wishing to obtain permit for long-term
                                                                                                residence in Luxembourg. 
Family member means:
- The spouse;
- Their children under 18 years old;
- Children of the spouse under 18 years old.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Family Reunion]
Please Note: 
- There is a service charge of 24.5€ (Inclusive of 20% VAT)  levied per application over and above the visa fees
- Mobile Biometric Service
- Please reach contact center (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/lux/contact-us)
to get more details about mobile biometric service.
- Visa fee, VFS service fee and Courier fee will be charged in Euro and cash, and other services will be charged in Turkish Lira and Cash. A receipt will be issued for all payments made at the centre.
Note:
All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may only be paid in cash, please note change will be given in Turkish Lira. 

## Documents Required
- Long-term application form (completed, dated and signed)
- Passport
- Two recent, passport type, coloured photographs with white background
- Letter of autorisation to stay/autorisation de séjour from Luxembourg (copy is sufficient)

## To Download a Form:

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer 
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply  with the following specifications: 
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 50 – 50 mm
- Full face taken straight forward.
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be shut
- Applicants should clearly write their name and surname on the back of their photographs

                                                                                                Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos. 

## Processing Time
Since our work is primarily administrative in nature, we have no say on whether you will be granted a visa and how long it will take to process, as this is entirely
                                                                                                the prerogative of the Embassy of Luxembourg in Turkey. 

## Download Forms
The application form for Luxembourg can be downloaded from the below link.
Visa Application Form EN (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/s2RQYo5tNB3HdjZ05TkCd/5b5ab936dd36cbc427e3a393e9afc7b4/turkey_application-form-en.pdf) 
Visa Application Form FR 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer 
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is intended to allow foreign nationals to obtain a long term visa (type D) allowing them to stay in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg for
                                                                                                over 90 days. This visa applies to those who are admitted to the licensed educational institutions for formal education, as well as for those who want to work
                                                                                                within the legal frame of employment upon taking work permit as per appointed procedure. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is intended to allow foreign nationals to obtain a long term visa (type D) allowing them to stay in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg for
                                                                                                over 90 days. This visa applies to those who are admitted to the licensed educational institutions for formal education, as well as for those who want to work
                                                                                                within the legal frame of employment upon taking work permit as per appointed procedure. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information.

A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply  with the following specifications: 
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 50 – 50 mm
- Full face taken straight forward.
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be shut
- Applicants should clearly write their name and surname on the back of their photographs

## Processing Time
Since our work is primarily administrative in nature, we have no say on whether you will be granted a visa and how long it will take to process, as this is entirely

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Luxembourg for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Luxembourg for work reasons
                                                                        (to sign the contract, participate in business meeting etc.) but does not allow carrying out the professional activity.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Luxembourg for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Luxembourg for work reasons
                                                                        (to sign the contract, participate in business meeting etc.) but does not allow carrying out the professional activity.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business]
Please Note: 
- There is a service charge of 24.5€ (Inclusive of 20% VAT)  levied per application over and above the visa fees
- Mobile Biometric Service
- Please reach contact center (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/lux/contact-us)
to get more details about mobile biometric service.
- Visa fee, VFS service fee and Courier fee will be charged in Euro and cash, and other services will be charged in Turkish Lira and Cash. A receipt will be issued for all payments made at the centre.
Note:
All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may only be  paid in cash, please note change will be given in Turkish Lira.

## Documents Required

Business Visa

- Full face taken straight forward 50 - 50 mm from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be shut
- Applicants should clearly write their name and surname on the back of their photographs
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission
                                                                            Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos. 

## Processing Time
Since our work is primarily administrative in nature, we have no say on whether you will be granted a visa and how long it will take to process, as this is entirely the prerogative of

- Long-term application form (completed, dated and signed)
- Passport
- Two recent, passport type, coloured photographs with white background
- Letter of autorisation to stay/autorisation de séjour from Luxembourg (copy is sufficient)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  STUDY (UNIVERSITY/MASTER/DOCTORATE)]
Please Note: 
- There is a service charge of 24.5€ (Inclusive of 20% VAT)  levied per application over and above the visa fees
- Mobile Biometric Service
- Please reach contact center (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/lux/contact-us)
to get more details about mobile biometric service.
- Visa fee, VFS service fee and Courier fee will be charged in Euro and cash, and other services will be charged in Turkish Lira and Cash. A receipt will be issued for all payments made at the centre.
Note:
All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may only be paid in cash, please note change will be given in Turkish Lira.

Visa Application Form FR
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is intended to allow foreign nationals to obtain a long term visa (type D) allowing them to stay in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg for
                                                                                                over 90 days. This visa applies to those who are admitted to the licensed educational institutions for formal education, as well as for those who intend to
                                                                                                pursue master or doctor degree. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is intended to allow foreign nationals to obtain a long term visa (type D) allowing them to stay in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg for
                                                                                                over 90 days. This visa applies to those who are admitted to the licensed educational institutions for formal education, as well as for those who intend to
                                                                                                pursue master or doctor degree. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  STUDY (UNIVERSITY/MASTER/DOCTORATE)]
Please Note: 
- There is a service charge of 24.5€ (Inclusive of 20% VAT)  levied per application over and above the visa fees
- Mobile Biometric Service
- Please reach contact center (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/lux/contact-us)
to get more details about mobile biometric service.
- Visa fee, VFS service fee and Courier fee will be charged in Euro and cash, and other services will be charged in Turkish Lira and Cash. A receipt will be issued for all payments made at the centre.
Note:
All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may only be paid in cash, please note change will be given in Turkish Lira. 

## Documents Required
- Long-term application form (completed, dated and signed)
- Passport
- Two recent, passport type, coloured photographs with white background
- Letter of autorisation to stay/autorisation de séjour from Luxembourg (copy is sufficient)

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply  with the following specifications: 
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 50 – 50 mm
- Full face taken straight.
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be shut
- Applicants should clearly write their name and surname on the back of their photographs

                                                                                                Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos. 

## Processing Time
Since our work is primarily administrative in nature, we have no say on whether you will be granted a visa and how long it will take to process, as this is entirely
                                                                                                the prerogative of the Embassy of Luxembourg in Turkey. 

## Download Forms
The application form for Luxembourg can be downloaded from the below link.
Visa Application Form EN (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/s2RQYo5tNB3HdjZ05TkCd/5b5ab936dd36cbc427e3a393e9afc7b4/turkey_application-form-en.pdf) 
Visa Application Form FR 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is intended to allow foreign nationals to obtain a long term visa (type D) allowing them to stay in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg for
                                                                                                over 90 days. This visa applies to those who want to conduct scientific research in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg. Prospective applicants
                                                                                                will find useful guidelines and details of requirements for this visa category on this page. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is intended to allow foreign nationals to obtain a long term visa (type D) allowing them to stay in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg for
                                                                                                over 90 days. This visa applies to those who want to conduct scientific research in the territory of the Grand-Duchy of Luxembourg. Prospective applicants
                                                                                                will find useful guidelines and details of requirements for this visa category on this page. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that they fall under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Researchers]
Please Note: 
- There is a service charge of 24.5€ (Inclusive of 20% VAT)  levied per application over and above the visa fees
- Mobile Biometric Service
- Please reach contact center (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/lux/contact-us)
to get more details about mobile biometric service.
- Visa fee, VFS service fee and Courier fee will be charged in Euro and cash, and other services will be charged in Turkish Lira and Cash. A receipt will be issued for all payments made at the centre.
Note:
All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may only be paid in cash, please note change will be given in Turkish Lira. 

## Documents Required
- Long-term application form (completed, dated and signed)
- Passport
- Two recent, passport type, coloured photographs with white background
- Letter of autorisation to stay/autorisation de séjour from Luxembourg (copy is sufficient)

## To Download a Form:

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer 
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply  with the following specifications: 
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 50 – 50 mm
- Full face taken straight forward.
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be shut
- Applicants should clearly write their name and surname on the back of their photographs

                                                                                                Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos. 

## Processing Time
Since our work is primarily administrative in nature, we have no say on whether you will be granted a visa and how long it will take to process, as this is entirely
                                                                                                the prerogative of the Embassy of Luxembourg in Turkey.

## Download Forms
The application form for Luxembourg can be downloaded from the below link.
Visa Application Form EN (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/s2RQYo5tNB3HdjZ05TkCd/5b5ab936dd36cbc427e3a393e9afc7b4/turkey_application-form-en.pdf)

- Click on the form link

OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Luxembourg for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for drivers conducting international cargo and
                                                                                passenger transportation services to Luxembourg in vehicles registered in Turkey. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Luxembourg for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for drivers conducting international cargo and
                                                                                passenger transportation services to Luxembourg in vehicles registered in Turkey. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
Please click on each of the above tab for detailed information. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Lorry Driver]
Please  Note: 
- There is a service charge of 24.5€ (Inclusive of 20% VAT)  levied per application over and above the visa fees
- Mobile Biometric Service
- Please reach contact center (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tur/en/lux/contact-us)
to get more details about mobile biometric service.
- Visa fee, VFS service fee and Courier fee will be charged in Euro and cash, and other services will be charged in Turkish Lira and Cash. A receipt will be issued for all payments made at the centre.
Note:
All fees and service charge listed above are non-refundable and may only be  paid in cash, please note change will be given in Turkish Lira.

## Documents Required
Lorry Driver Visa 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
- Checklist for an EU family member

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply  with the following specifications: 
- Must be an up-to-date photograph
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- One passport-size photograph according to ICAO standards and not older than 3 months
- Full face taken straight forward 50 - 50 mm from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a light background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
- The mouth must be shut
- Applicants should clearly write their name and surname on the back of their photographs

                                                                                Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos. 

## Processing Time
Since our work is primarily administrative in nature, we have no say on whether you will be granted a visa and how long it will take to process, as this is entirely the prerogative
                                                                                of the Embassy of Luxembourg in Turkey. 

## Download Forms
The application form for Luxembourg can be downloaded from the below link.
Visa Application Form (Turkish)
Visa Application Form (English) 
Visa Application Form (French) 

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer 
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
